meaning: adj.蜿蜒的,错综复杂的,动作复杂的,不老实的
examples: The great creator raised his sinuous, powerful, flexible arm, and we know where we stand.
The aurora has a sinuous ribbon shape that separates into discrete spots near the lower right corner of the image.
Many of Mrs Lalanne's pieces are fashioned from sinuous vines and leaves twisted into candelabra, garden benches, jewellery and gates.
The look is all waves, sinuous lines created by tabletops that snake through the club.
The freely curlicued graphic and the comradely and casually sinuous dance numbers neatly complemented each other.
